'''Strained keebadas''', known in [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]] as '''''keebadas binggona''''', was a [[Foodstuff/Legends|food dish]] containing [[keebada]]s. Strained keebadas were produced by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Species/Legends|species]] who considered a delicacy.<ref name="GPBATG" />

In [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], the [[Human/Legends|Human]] scholar, [[Ebenn Q3 Baobab/Legends|Ebenn Q3 Baobab]] recommended the dish as one of his favorites in his [[Book/Legends|book]], ''[[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide]]'' and advised any Humans visiting the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] of [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] to try it in the Hutt [[Restaurant/Legends|eateries]] found there. The dish was mentioned in the Huttese section of the guide, in which Baobab recommended that it be eaten with gloves. The section also explained that Huttese dishes were usually eaten casually in a random order, with utensils being optional and prices being high.<ref name="GPBATG" /> In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> strained keebadas were served at a feast held by the Hutt [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Popara Anjiliac Diresto]] in his [[Popara's penthouse|penthouse]] on the planet [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]].<ref name="Sc">[[Scourge (novel)|''Scourge'']]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Strained keebadas were first mentioned in the book [[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']], which was written by [[Ben Burtt]] and published in [[2001]].<ref name="GPBATG" /> They later appeared in the [[2012]] novel [[Scourge (novel)|''Scourge'']] written by [[Jeff Grubb]]. Scourge was a novelized version of the [[Wizards of the Coast]] ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' adventure ''[[Tempest Feud]]'',<ref name="Sc" /> although the dish was not mentioned in the original RPG material.<ref name="TF">''[[Tempest Feud]]''</ref>
